g.text: Client-Server + Micro-Kernel + Layered + Versioned C ABI Plug-ins
Plug-in Cluster (loaded by the kernel through IPluginABI)
• Client-server split at the system level (this diagram).
• Micro-kernel server with a versioned C ABI plug-in contract.
• Strict layered architecture inside the kernel:

URP / HDRP / UI Toolkit type so domain logic stays
